author: ByteBard
name: FireBullet3D
shortDescription: 3D weapon behavior with projectile/hitscan fire, fire modes, ammo/reload systems, spread bloom, advanced ray filters, and pooling.
description: Turn any 3D object into a complete weapon system for FPS/TPS projects.
- Ammo cost modes (per trigger or per projectile).
- Tactical/chambered reload options + cancel reload action.
- Safer save keys with WeaponId + ProfileId.
- Extra expressions: max reserve, cooldown, reload progress, clip full.

eventsFunctions.description: Deletes all data in the selected save slot only when confirmation phrase is provided.
eventsFunctions.name: ClearAllSaveData
eventsFunctions.sentence: Clear all save data from slot _PARAM1_ if confirm is _PARAM2_

propertyDescriptors.label: Filter Tag
propertyDescriptors.description: Optional userData tag that targets must match.
propertyDescriptors.name: FilterTag

propertyDescriptors.label: Tag userData Key
propertyDescriptors.description: userData key used for tag filtering.
propertyDescriptors.name: TagUserDataKey

propertyDescriptors.label: Enable Penetration
propertyDescriptors.description: Allow hitscan rays to continue through valid targets.
propertyDescriptors.name: EnablePenetration

propertyDescriptors.label: Max Penetration Count
propertyDescriptors.description: Maximum number of penetrations per shot.
propertyDescriptors.name: MaxPenetrationCount

propertyDescriptors.label: Enable Ricochet
propertyDescriptors.description: Allow hitscan rays to bounce on surfaces.
propertyDescriptors.name: EnableRicochet

propertyDescriptors.label: Max Ricochet Bounces
propertyDescriptors.description: Maximum ricochet bounces per shot.
propertyDescriptors.name: MaxRicochetBounces

propertyDescriptors.label: Ricochet Energy Loss
propertyDescriptors.description: 0-1 distance loss multiplier applied each bounce.
propertyDescriptors.name: RicochetEnergyLoss

propertyDescriptors.label: Enable Bullet Pooling
propertyDescriptors.description: Reuse inactive bullets before creating new ones.
propertyDescriptors.name: EnablePooling

propertyDescriptors.label: Weapon Id
propertyDescriptors.description: Stable identifier used for save/load keys.
propertyDescriptors.name: WeaponId

propertyDescriptors.label: Default Profile Id
propertyDescriptors.description: Default profile prefix for save/load operations.
propertyDescriptors.name: DefaultProfileId
